decisions.rationale: Observation for MTA New York City Transit (agency, acronym NYCT) already resolves to base_record_id entity_mta-nyct. The registry record already lists source 201110_brt_34th_cac5 and matches on entity_name (MTA New York City Transit), entity_type (agency), and acronym (NYCT). No different record to link to.

Observation for New York City Department of Transportation (agency, acronym NYC DOT) already resolves to base_record_id entity_nyc-dot. The registry record already lists source 201110_brt_34th_cac5 and matches on entity_name (New York City Department of Transportation) and entity_type (agency). No different record to link to.

proposed_relations.description: MTA NYCT was lead agency and NYC DOT was co-presenter/partner agency for the 34th Street SBS project presented at CAC Meeting #5 (October 2011).
